questionHtml:
Which equation represents hydration enthalpy?

A.  Na+ (g) → Na+ (aq)

B.  Na+ (aq) → Na+ (g)

C.  NaCl (s) → NaCl (aq)

D.  NaCl (aq) → NaCl (s)

meta.title: Which equation represents hydration enthalpy? A. Na+ (g) → Na+ (aq) B. Na+ (aq) → Na+ (g) C. NaCl (s) → NaCl (aq) D. NaCl (aq) → NaCl (s)
